content_body:
Welcome to the Burra Burra on the River. Offering classic American food, beer, and wine. Enjoy dining on the deck by the river. Serving lunch and dinner in McCaysville, GA.

Menu classics featuring starters like fried pickles, nachos, and jalapeno poppers. Chef specialties like sirloin steak, freshly caught trout, salmon, and their signature Shepherd’s Pie!

Soups and salads, chicken wings with a variety of flavors (lemon pepper, sweet & spicy, buffalo, moonshine BBQ, sweet Thai chili, and teriyaki honey), street tacos, burgers, hoagies, and much more!
title: Burra Burra on the River
